query:
UPDATE host_listings 
SET 
  overseasExperience = 'I lived in Singapore for 3 years and traveled extensively across Southeast Asia. I also spent time in Japan learning traditional cooking techniques.',
  funFacts = 'I can name every ingredient just by smell! I also collect vintage Chinese teapots and have over 50 in my collection. My neighbors call me the "Dumpling Queen" because I make them every Sunday.',
  whyHost = 'After years of traveling and experiencing hospitality around the world, I wanted to share the warmth of Chinese home cooking with visitors. Food has always been my love language, and I believe the best way to understand a culture is through sharing a meal at someone''s table. Every guest who leaves my home becomes part of my extended family.',
  culturalPassions = 'Beyond food, I''m passionate about traditional Chinese tea ceremonies and calligraphy. I love sharing stories about Shanghai''s old neighborhoods and taking guests to hidden local markets that tourists never find. I also practice Tai Chi every morning in the park!'
WHERE hostName = 'Ayi';
command:

SET 
  overseasExperience = 'I lived in Singapore for 3 years and traveled extensively across Southeast Asia. I also spent time in Japan learning traditional cooking techniques.',
  funFacts = 'I can name every ingredient just by smell! I also collect vintage Chinese teapots and have over 50 in my collection. My neighbors call me the "Dumpling Queen" because I make them every Sunday.',
  whyHost = 'After years of traveling and experiencing hospitality around the world, I wanted to share the warmth of Chinese home cooking with visitors. Food has always been my love language, and I believe the best way to understand a culture is through sharing a meal at someone''s table. Every guest who leaves my home becomes part of my extended family.',
  culturalPassions = 'Beyond food, I''m passionate about traditional Chinese tea ceremonies and calligraphy. I love sharing stories about Shanghai''s old neighborhoods and taking guests to hidden local markets that tourists never find. I also practice Tai Chi every morning in the park!'
WHERE hostName = 'Ayi';
